step_by_step_thinking: The key anatomical feature mentioned in the articles related to distinguishing liver segments is the hepatic veins running between adjacent segments and eventually draining into the inferior vena cava. Therefore, among the given options, the hepatic vein best fits the criteria since it physically distinguishes between segments.
